right_hand.title: Default Assumption Bias
right_hand.description: When information is missing, models assume the most common pattern instead of considering alternatives. In this case, 70% of the people in the world are right handed , so the model shows the image of a right handed person.

gender.title: Gender Stereotyping
gender.description: Models often associate professions and powerful roles with males due to biased training data.

language.title: Cultural Misalignment
language.description: Different languages influence how scenes and identities are interpreted by the model.

architecture.title: Trigger word bias
architecture.description: AI Models often associate trigger words for visual elements, in this case the word 'smart' is often associated with a sci-fi aesthetic.

authority.title: Focus Collapse Bias
authority.description: The model emphasizes dominant subjects and suppresses surrounding context.

friction.title: Flattening Bias
friction.description: Crowded and complex environments are reduced into clean, frictionless scenes.
